site.title: Pens & Office Essentials | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Order custom branded pens, office essentials, giveaways & notebooks. High-use promo products for businesses, teams & offices. Practical, affordable & always in use.

hero.title: Pens & Office Essentials
hero.imageAlt: Custom branded pens, notebooks, and office essentials

centreText.title: Everyday Items. Amazing Exposure
centreText.description: Pens & office essentials are used every day on desks, in meetings & across teams, making them some of the most consistent & reliable branded items you can offer.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom branded pens and office essentials

features.title: Make Your Mark, Literally
features.description:
Custom branded pens are highly reliable promo items. They are low cost, high reach & constant visibility! The more you order, the more you save.

  • Ballpoint pens
  • Gel pens
  • Stylus pens
  • Executive pens
  • Bulk giveaway pens

We have an incredible selection of pens to choose from for all budgets.

features.title: Practical Office Giveaways
features.description:
We've got your office MVPs! These workplace promo items aren't flashy — just effective. Perfect for onboarding, client-facing teams, giveaways, tradeshows & swag bags.

  • Keychains
  • Stress balls
  • Lanyards & badge holders
  • Clipboards
  • Mousepads

These useful items stay in circulation longer, and so does your brand.

features.title: Custom Notebooks & More
features.description:
Bring everything together with custom printed office materials that match your brand & other promo items. Nothing pairs better with a great pen than a classy notebook!

  • Notebooks & journals
  • Notepads & memo pads
  • Calendars & planners
  • Custom stationery, including letterhead & envelopes

Handled in-house for consistency, quality & one-stop-shop convenience.
